raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a credit card dispute with Citibank for a purchase involving a damaged and hazardous product delivered by XXXX. 

The item arrived with severely compromised packaging and visible damage. The product had exposed components, and while removing it from the packaging, I sustained a laceration injury due to its condition upon delivery. 

XXXX arranged a return and replacement but denied responsibility for the unsafe condition and resulting injury. I was advised by XXXX to pursue the matter with XXXX, despite the fact that XXXX fulfilled the order and is responsible for delivery. 

I have filed a dispute with Citibank under damaged items. Given the circumstances involving a hazardous product and injury, I am requesting that Citibank conduct a thorough and fair investigation and ensure appropriate resolution of this dispute. 

I have documentation available, including photos of the packaging, product damage, and injury.
